CALIFORNIA IS A SERIOUSLY INCONVENIENT FORUM, ARKANSAS IS A SUITABLE ALTERNATIVE FORUM, AND THE PUBLIC AND PRIVATE FACTORS FAVOR HAVING THIS CASE HEARD IN ARKANSAS RATHER THAN CALIFORNIA. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS ASTRAZENECA PHARMACEUTICALS LP AND ASTRAZENECA, LP'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Appearances: William E. Steimle of King & Spalding (318.1259) for defendants and moving parties. No other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: off calendar due to the ruling on the motion to dismiss. One order incorporating all motions and joinders heard this day signed in open court. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288

Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Text Ruling

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: off calendar due to the ruling on the motion to dismiss. One order incorporating all motions and joinders heard this day signed in open court. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288

Notcie Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Based On Forum Of Non-Conveniens; Consent To Jurisdiction; Appendix
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS ASTRAZENECA PHARMACEUTICALS LP AND ASTRAZENECA, LP'S MOTION TO DISMISS BASED ON FORUM OF NON-CONVENIENS.
Appearances: William E. Steimle of King & Spalding (318.1259) for defendants and moving parties. No other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. California is a seriously inconvenient forum, Arkansas is a suitable alternative forum, and the public and private factors favor having this case heard in Arkansas rather than California. One order incorporating all motions and joinders heard this day signed in open court. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288
